🪽 || Bot keeps talking for you? : click on chat memory and type in “Only speak and decide actions for {{char}}, not {{user}}” || 🪽

🦈 || Bot has bad memory? : same solution as the first two issues, just type in the things that the bot forgot and generate a new response! || 🦈
